title: subprojects report
description: Scannable sub-folders within a repository. Empty list means the repo is a single unit at the root.

path.description: Sub-folder relative to repo root. No leading slash. This value is stored on Scan.sub_path when the analyst scopes a scan to this subproject.

name.description: Short human label. Prefer the manifest's own package name over the directory name.

kind.description: Detected flavour: go-module, npm-package, python-package, rust-crate, composer-package, maven-module, gradle-module, ruby-gem, swift-package, service.

description.description: One or two sentences on what this subproject is. Read the local README or infer from the manifest.

notes.description: Optional: anything the analyst should know. Truncation (more than 50 subprojects), unfamiliar monorepo layout, heuristics that fired ambiguously.
